scripts.check-openapi: npm run generate-openapi && tsx scripts/check-openapi.ts && tsx scripts/check-api-route-order.ts
scripts.check-types: tsx scripts/check-api-schema-patterns.ts && tsx scripts/check-route-security.ts && tsx scripts/check-no-route-writes.ts && tsx scripts/check-redis-singleton.ts && tsx scripts/check-route-errors.ts && tsx scripts/check-no-flat-error-responses.ts && tsx scripts/check-lib-root.ts && tsx scripts/check-lib-imports.ts && node ../../scripts/tsc-native.mjs --noEmit
scripts.dev: npm run check-env && tsx watch --env-file=.env.development.local src/index.ts
scripts.test:api: tsx --test src/test/status.test.ts src/test/api-key-access.test.ts src/test/route-security-audit.test.ts src/test/interactions-list-query.test.ts src/test/map-error-to-response.test.ts src/test/error-response-smoke.test.ts src/test/contacts-attention-count-schemas.test.ts src/test/keep-in-touch-count.test.ts src/test/fetch-contact-extras.test.ts src/test/contacts-select-list.test.ts
scripts.test:sync: tsx --test src/lib/data/redis.test.ts src/lib/sync/build-changes.test.ts src/lib/sync/emit-wake.test.ts src/lib/sync/wake/hub.test.ts src/lib/sync/wake/tickets.test.ts src/lib/sync/wake/in-memory-bus.test.ts
